name: Sino Golf Holdings Limited
summary: Sino Golf Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells golf equipment, and related components and parts in Japan, North America, Europe, rest of Asia, and internationally. The company operates through Golf Equipment, Golf Bags, and Hospitality segments. It offers assembled and packaged golf clubs, club heads, shafts and golf bags, and accessories on an original equipment manufacturing and original design manufacturing basis to golf companies. The company also develops an integrated resort in Saipan. In addition, it trades in golf equipment, golf bags, and accessories, as well as related components and parts; and holds properties. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
